rules.rule_text:
rule XorDDoSv1
{
	meta:
		author = "Akamai SIRT"
		description = "Rule to detect XorDDoS infection"
		reference = "https://www.akamai.com/us/en/multimedia/documents/state-of-the-internet/fast-dns-xor-botnet-case-study.pdf"

	strings:
		$st0 = "BB2FA36AAA9541F0"
		$st1 = "md5="
		$st2 = "denyip="
		$st3 = "filename="
		$st4 = "rmfile="
		$st5 = "exec_packet"
		$st6 = "build_iphdr"

	condition:
		all of them
}
